scripts.db:up: sh -c 'if [ -f infra/docker-compose.yml ]; then docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d; else echo "Skipping db:up: infra/docker-compose.yml not found"; fi'
scripts.db:down: sh -c 'if [ -f infra/docker-compose.yml ]; then docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down; else echo "Skipping db:down: infra/docker-compose.yml not found"; fi'
scripts.db:migrate: sh -c 'if [ -d apps/api ]; then cd apps/api && dbmate up; else echo "Skipping db:migrate: apps/api not found"; fi'
scripts.db:rollback: sh -c 'if [ -d apps/api ]; then cd apps/api && dbmate rollback; else echo "Skipping db:rollback: apps/api not found"; fi'
